name: Tenis Tracker
tagline: Personal match tracker for tennis tournament players
description: A web app for tennis players to log their journey through tournaments. Players record each match by round, opponent and set-by-set score — including tie-breaks, walkovers, retirements and byes — and the app derives their result in each tournament (champion, finalist, or eliminated in a given round). Public player profiles showcase a personal match history, with passwordless login via email OTP or a reverse WhatsApp magic link.
highlights: Match logging by round with set-by-set scores, tie-breaks, walkovers, retirements and byes
Automatic tournament result derivation (champion, finalist, eliminated in a given round)
Passwordless auth: email OTP plus reverse WhatsApp magic link via Kapso WhatsApp Cloud API
Shared curated catalog of tournaments, categories and venues with superadmin approval and duplicate merging
Public player profiles at /{slug} with privacy controls and avatar uploads
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code (CLAUDE.md, .claude/ directory, and .agents/ skills configured)
